audience_policies.source_phrase: (PRINTABLE) Pass admits up to 5 people with free admission to the USS Constitution Museum. Museum is open daily April 1 - October 31 9:00-6:00, and November 1 - March 31 10:00-5:00. FOR NEEDHAM RESIDENTS ONLY
